'''Isen''' was a young [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] and the sole [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Isen system/Legends|Isen system]]. Its five [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]] [[Satellite/Legends|satellites]] included [[Isen IV]].<ref name="PoG1" />

{{Planet-stub}}
